title: Countdown display with per-second auto-decrement
description: User Story: clicking Start displays days/hours/minutes/seconds until the event, and the display auto-decrements every second (seconds roll 59->0 and borrow from minutes, etc.). Use setInterval; clean up on restart.
acceptance_criteria: Timer visibly ticks down each second with correct borrow behavior; restarting with a new event resets cleanly.

title: Countdown calculation using builtin Date only
description: Compute time remaining to the target datetime using only builtin Date math (no libraries). Break the remaining ms into days, hours, minutes, seconds. Target for the primary event: 2026-07-10 17:00 EDT (21:00 UTC).
acceptance_criteria: Given a target datetime, returns correct days/hours/minutes/seconds; uses only builtin Date; verified against the hackathon target.

title: Event input form: name, date, optional time, Start button
description: User Story: event input box with an event name field, a date field, an optional time field, and a 'Start' button. Omitted time = midnight local on the event date. Pre-fill the form with the hackathon event: name 'Hackathon ends', date 2026-07-10, time 17:00 (EDT).
acceptance_criteria: Form renders all four controls; labelled and keyboard-usable; defaults to the hackathon event.

title: Scaffold apps/countdown-timer/ and register on landing page
description: Create apps/countdown-timer/{index.html,style.css,script.js} with a Back link to ../../index.html, per CLAUDE.md conventions. Add a 'Countdown Timer' link to #app-list in the root index.html.
acceptance_criteria: Folder exists with the three files; back link works; new link visible on landing page.

title: Countdown Timer app — count down to hackathon end (2026-07-10 17:00 EDT)
description:
Build the Countdown Timer app from the app-ideas spec, with the primary event pre-set to the hackathon end: 2026-07-10 17:00 EDT (21:00 UTC). Spec: https://github.com/florinpop17/app-ideas/blob/master/Projects/1-Beginner/Countdown-Timer-App.md

## Context
Constraints from spec: use only builtin language/Date functions (no MomentJS or similar libs); original implementation (no countdown-site generators). Stack: vanilla HTML/CSS/JS per CLAUDE.md; app lives at apps/countdown-timer/.

title: Input validation warnings (blank name, bad date/time, overflow)
description: User Stories: warn if event name is blank; warn if date/time is invalid; warn if the remaining time would overflow the timer's precision. Warnings shown inline; block starting on invalid input.
acceptance_criteria: Each of the three invalid cases shows a clear warning and prevents the countdown from starting.

title: Bonus: multiple events, each with its own countdown timer
description: Bonus Features: allow defining more than one event and show a separate countdown timer for each defined event.
acceptance_criteria: User can add multiple events; each renders its own independently ticking countdown.

title: Bonus: alert when the event is reached
description: Bonus Feature: when the countdown reaches zero, notify the user (visible on-page alert/message; stop the timer).
acceptance_criteria: At T=0 the timer stops and a clear 'event reached' notification is shown.

title: Bonus: persist event across sessions (localStorage)
description: Bonus Feature: save the defined event so it persists across page reloads/sessions using localStorage. Restore and resume the countdown on load.
acceptance_criteria: Reloading the page restores the last event and continues counting down.
